_comment: Cardamom config for LOCAL testing — point at a SimPeer or your own node on localhost. Run with Cardamom.Node.start(config_file: "config/testing.json", first_peer: %{host: "localhost", port: <PORT>}). Set the port to wherever your local peer is listening (it changes per run for an OS-assigned SimPeer port, so usually override first_peer.port in opts). Same code path as preview.json — only the params differ.
